title: Streamline core documentation (GEMINI.md & AGENTS.md)
description: phase1 : compare agents.md with gemini.md, update gemini.md with whats missing in it phase2 : analyize the responsabilities in gemini.md phase3 : responsabilities should be moved to skills/agents or sub documentation linked by the gemini.md make a proposal of what can be done the goal is to keep gemini.md as little as possible.
